questions.text: The SI unit of velocity is:
questions.explanation: The SI unit of velocity is meter per second (m/s). Velocity is displacement per unit time.

questions.text: For uniform motion, the position-time graph is a straight line.
questions.explanation: For uniform motion (constant velocity), the position-time graph is a straight line with constant slope.

questions.text: The rate of change of velocity is called ________.
questions.explanation: Acceleration is defined as the rate of change of velocity with time. a = dv/dt

questions.text: Write the equation for position in uniformly accelerated motion.
questions.explanation: For uniformly accelerated motion: x = x0 + v0t + (1/2)at^2, where x0 is initial position, v0 is initial velocity, a is acceleration.
